name: xss-reflected
note: A parameter reflected into the HTML response.

probe.strategy: Send a unique random canary (e.g. hovxss9q2k); if it reflects unencoded, escalate to a context-appropriate payload (<svg onload=...>, attribute breakout). Confirm by the marker appearing executable/unencoded in the response.
probe.signal: The canary appears unencoded in an executable HTML context.
